name: photon-imessage-plugin
description: iMessage integration for AGNT via Photon Spectrum. Send and receive blue-bubble iMessages from workflows, with allowlist + pairing guardrails. Modeled on the Hermes Agent Photon pattern.
author: AGNT

schema.title: Photon iMessage API
schema.description: Send iMessages and manage Photon Spectrum conversations. Choose an action to send a message/attachment, list conversations, register a user, check the assigned line, or call any raw Spectrum method.

action.description: The Photon iMessage operation to perform.

projectId.description: Optional fallback Photon Spectrum project ID. If omitted, AGNT uses the connected Photon provider from Settings → Connections.

projectSecret.description: Optional fallback Photon Spectrum project secret. If omitted, AGNT uses the connected Photon provider.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional Photon Spectrum base URL. Defaults to https://spectrum.photon.codes.

spaceId.description: Photon conversation (space) ID. Use this to reply into an existing thread.

recipient.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567). Use to start a new conversation or register a user.

message.description: Message text to send. For SEND_ATTACHMENT this becomes the caption (a separate iMessage bubble).

filePath.description: Local path to the attachment to send (image, voice note, video, document).

fileName.description: Optional override filename for the attachment. Defaults to the file's base name.

method.description: For RAW_SPECTRUM_CALL: dotted Spectrum method name, e.g. space.send, app.status, app.spaces.list.

payloadJson.description: For RAW_SPECTRUM_CALL: JSON object payload for the Spectrum method. Use {} or leave empty for no payload.

httpMethod.description: For RAW_SPECTRUM_CALL: override the HTTP verb. Leave blank to auto-detect.

includeRaw.description: Include the raw Photon Spectrum response in the output.

raw.description: Raw Photon response when includeRaw is enabled.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.

schema.title: Receive iMessage
schema.description: Listen for incoming iMessages through Photon Spectrum. Allowlist-gated by default, with optional pairing prompts and group mention-gating.

projectId.description: Optional fallback Photon Spectrum project ID. If omitted, AGNT uses the connected Photon provider from Settings → Connections.

projectSecret.description: Optional fallback Photon Spectrum project secret. If omitted, AGNT uses the connected Photon provider.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional Photon Spectrum base URL. Defaults to https://spectrum.photon.codes.

allowedUsers.description: Comma/newline-separated E.164 phone allowlist. Only these numbers can drive your workflow. Strongly recommended.

allowAllUsers.description: DANGER: allow messages from ANY sender. Development only — leave off in production.

pairingMode.description: When an unknown number texts in, reply with a pairing code instead of silently ignoring it. On by default.

requireMention.description: In group chats, only respond when the agent is mentioned (wake word).

mentionPatterns.description: Optional regex wake patterns, one per line. Defaults to AGNT / Annie / @AGNT / @Annie.

ignoreGroups.description: Ignore all group-chat messages; only react to 1:1 DMs.

dropPendingOnStart.description: Ignore messages that arrived before the workflow started; only fire for new ones. On by default.

limit.description: Max messages to fetch per poll (1-200). Default 50.

includeRaw.description: Include the raw Photon message payload in the trigger output.

spaceId.description: Photon conversation/space ID — pass this back to photon-imessage-api to reply.

isGroup.description: Whether the message came from a group chat.

attachments.description: Attachment metadata (bytes are metadata-only on Photon's free tier).

serviceLine.description: The Photon iMessage line the message arrived on.

raw.description: Raw Photon payload when includeRaw is enabled.
